title: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) — Intrinsic Value & Prospect Score
description: Opus 4.6 independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of Broadcom Inc. (AVGO). Economic Prospect Score: 77/100 — Strong Prospect.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y10)
fcfGrowth.rationale: Broadcom is the most disciplined acquirer in semiconductors. The VMware acquisition transforms it into an infrastructure software powerhouse while custom AI accelerators (XPUs for Google, Meta) positi...

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale: A 10.0% WACC reflects Broadcom Inc.'s risk profile, including sector-specific volatility, competitive dynamics, and macroeconomic sensitivity.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale: A 3.0% terminal rate assumes Broadcom Inc. grows roughly in line with nominal GDP into perpetuity, reflecting the law of large numbers for a mature large-cap enterprise.

thesisParagraphs: Broadcom is the most disciplined acquirer in semiconductors. The VMware acquisition transforms it into an infrastructure software powerhouse while custom AI accelerators (XPUs for Google, Meta) position it as the key NVIDIA alternative. FCF margins exceed 45%.

Hock Tan's playbook — acquire, cut costs, raise prices — has compounded shareholder value at 25%+ annually for a decade. My 14% growth rate assumes continued AI tailwinds and VMware synergies, though the 10% discount rate reflects integration risk and customer concentration in hyperscalers.
verdictFooter: Opus 4.6 independent analysis. Data via public filings (Mar 20, 2026).

faq.question: How does VMware change Broadcom's valuation?
faq.answer: VMware adds $15B+ in high-margin recurring software revenue, diversifying Broadcom away from cyclical semiconductors. The combination creates a unique infrastructure company spanning chips, networking, and enterprise software.

faq.question: Can Broadcom compete with NVIDIA in AI?
faq.answer: Not directly in GPUs, but Broadcom's custom XPU accelerators (designed for specific hyperscaler workloads) offer better price-performance for inference. This is a growing $15B+ market.

faq.question: What's the biggest risk?
faq.answer: Customer concentration. Google and Meta represent a significant portion of AI chip revenue. If either builds fully in-house or shifts to a competitor, the impact would be material.

prospectVerdictDetail: Broadcom is a well-run semiconductor conglomerate with best-in-class margins and VMware transforming it into an infrastructure software powerhouse. The AI networking opportunity provides secular growth. Hock Tan's operational discipline is legendary.
prospectKeyRisks: VMware integration — aggressive licensing changes driving customers to alternatives like Nutanix
Custom ASIC competition from Marvell and hyperscaler internal designs
Acquisition-driven growth model reaching scale limits
prospectKeyCatalysts: VMware cross-selling into Broadcom's semiconductor customer base
AI networking revenue reaching $15B+ as hyperscaler AI cluster buildouts accelerate
Private cloud modernization via VMware Cloud Foundation becoming enterprise default
prospectMethodology: Score is based on three pillars: Competitive Momentum (0-35), Moat Durability (0-35), and Sentiment & Catalysts (0-30), totaling 0-100.
